verdicts.title: CLI ships Electron 42.1.0 while desktop app builds/tests on 43.1.1
verdicts.note: tools/cli/package.json:26 pins electron 42.1.0 as the runtime dep; apps/desktop/package.json:46 pins 43.1.1 — a genuine Electron major skew between the npm-launched surface and what CI/electron-builder validate.

verdicts.title: Supervised boot contract implemented twice and drifted (wallet-page env)
verdicts.note: run-local.mjs backend/facade extraEnv (run-local.mjs:388-396,435-442) sets neither SIWE_ORIGIN nor FACADE_WEB_DIST_DIR that the supervisor sets at service-env.ts:191,242, and the smoke only hits /v1/auth/providers — so it no longer proves wallet-page serving despite README.md:5-7's 'exactly the processes' claim.

verdicts.title: SERVICES + SHARED_PACKAGES lists hand-mirrored between stager and payload assembler
verdicts.note: assemble-payload.mjs:26-34 re-declares byte-identical per-service dir lists (incl. ai-backend config/skills) and shared packages that stage.mjs:56-77 owns, with an explicit 'Mirror tools/desktop-runtime/stage.mjs SERVICES' comment — real drift-prone duplication.

verdicts.title: Harness dev posture writes into real prod userData (phantom isolation)
verdicts.note: COPILOT_DESKTOP_USER_DATA_SUBDIR is set only at driver.mjs:93 and has zero consumers repo-wide; apps/desktop never calls app.setPath('userData',...), using app.getPath('userData') directly (index.ts:177 etc.), so dev-posture smoke shares production userData.

verdicts.title: Manual unreproducible npm publish folds a gitignored credential into the public tarball
verdicts.note: No publish workflow exists (no npm publish/NPM_TOKEN anywhere in .github/workflows); prepack's assemble-payload.mjs:207-208 copies gitignored apps/desktop/google-oauth.json — documented as containing id+secret at apps/desktop/.gitignore:15-18 — into the payload with no CI attestation.

verdicts.title: Third hand-copy of the SIWE EIP-4361 template in the harness
verdicts.note: Low severity — accepted as-is per verification policy (siwe-session.mjs re-implements the template documented as a byte-identical pair in frontend/backend).

verdicts.title: Zero behavioral tests + zero CI for the stager and destructive CLI code
verdicts.note: No *.test.*/*.spec.* files in any of the three tool dirs; ci-desktop.yml:15-26 path filter omits tools/desktop-runtime/**, ci-cli.yml runs only check/smoke/manifest-check, and stage.mjs runs only in tag-triggered release-desktop.yml — leaving untested rmSync destructive logic at uninstall.mjs:206 and repair.mjs:119.

verdicts.title: Constant/path facts duplicated across files
verdicts.note: Low severity — accepted as-is per verification policy (cache/state paths, branding constants, and isSafeTarget duplicated with comments but no machine check).

verdicts.title: Small dead surface in the CLI (needsStage, unused import, unused --yes)
verdicts.note: Low severity — accepted as-is per verification policy (needsStage export, unused existsSync import, repair's unused --yes).

verdicts.title: Stale 'broken wallet.html' comment + vestigial single-element loop in harness
verdicts.note: Low severity — accepted as-is per verification policy (siwe-session.mjs header claims wallet.html is still broken after FIX-VERIFICATION recorded it fixed).
